notes:
Big catch-up update since 1.35.0.

• Fleet Ops: named ship groups (Scouts / Mining / Cargo) on the op + live crew board.
• Customizable dashboard: drag & resize panels, pin anything, set-to-default.
• Social: friends list + 1:1 direct messages, with a dashboard unread indicator.
• Refinery: multi-ore work orders, photo-scan import, price locking, live timers.
• Rock Break & Crafting tools (still in progress).

Under the hood: locked down the backend so only the app can use the photo-scan and Discord features, safer local-data handling, and honest sign-in guidance (Google and Discord are separate accounts).
